case_title: JASHVANT PATEL DBA FAIRFAX HOTEL VS. SHAY BARKER et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION MICHAEL HEATH FILED RE: CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JASHVANT PATEL DBA FAIRFAX HOTEL

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JASHVANT PATEL DBA FAIRFAX HOTEL AS TO DEFENDANT BARKER, SHAY HINKLE, ALISSA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF JASHVANT PATEL DBA FAIRFAX HOTEL SERVED NOV-18-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BARKER, SHAY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JASHVANT PATEL DBA FAIRFAX HOTEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARKER, SHAY HINKLE, ALISSA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 420 EDDY STREET, #56 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
